papers.title: Poplar NF-YA11 alters lignin composition and increases methane yield by upregulating the FERULIC ACID 5-HYDROXYLASE 2 gene
CRISPR-Cas9 editing of CAFFEOYL SHIKIMATE ESTERASE 1 and 2 shows their importance and partial redundancy in lignification in Populus tremula x P. alba
papers.authors: de Vries L, Guevara-Rozo S, Cobo-Medina M, Hoengenaert L, Ando D, Keene C, Gjersing E, Vega-Sánchez ME, Ralph J, Loque D

edges.ev: PtoMYB156 is negative regulator; overexpression downregulates PtoPAL1 expression
PtoMYB156 OE downregulates C4H2
PtoMYB156 negatively regulates phenylpropanoid pathway genes including 4CL
PtoMYB156 OE downregulates HCT1
PtoMYB156 OE downregulates C3H1
PtoMYB156 OE downregulates CCoMOT1
PtoMYB156 OE downregulates F5H2
PtoMYB156 OE downregulates LAC40
ER-localized E2 ubiquitin-conjugating enzyme 34 PtoUBC34 interaction regulates transactivity of PtoMYB156 and reduces its repression activity
PdMYB221 binds PdCOMT2 promoter by EMSA; transactivation shows repression
PdMYB221 represses PdCCR1 in transactivation assays
PdMYB221 overexpression suppresses 9 lignin synthetic genes including CCOMT1
PdMYB221 OE suppresses lignin synthetic genes including C4H
PdMYB221 OE suppresses HCT
PdMYB221 OE suppresses C3H1
PdMYB221 OE suppresses CAD5
PdMYB221 OE suppresses PAL1
PdMYB221 OE suppresses 4CL1
PdMYB221 OE suppresses SND1 NST1 VND6 MYB85
MYB4 can be activated by MYB46 (PtrMYB3/20 orthologs) second-level master regulator
PtKNAT7-OE shows 5-7% increase in S/G ratios; PtKNAT7 antisense 8-12% increase in S/G and 6% lignin decrease
PAL upregulated in PtKNAT7-OE lines
CCR upregulated in PtKNAT7-OE lines
MYB46 (PtrMYB3/20) directly regulate KNAT7, impacting biosynthesis
LTF1 directly binds 4-coumarate-CoA ligase (4CL) promoter; unphosphorylated LTF1 restrains lignin biosynthesis
PdMPK6 phosphorylates LTF1 leading to proteasome degradation and activation of lignification
External stimuli such as wounding activate PdMPK6 which phosphorylates LTF1
PtrEPSP-TF displays binding affinity to promoter of hAT transposase gene PtrhAT; represses PtrhAT
PtrhAT is nuclear protein with transcriptional repressor activity; direct repression target is PtrMYB021
PtrbZIP44-A1 recruits PtrHDA15 to promoters of PtrCCoAOMT2 and PtrCCR2 (epigenetic repression)
PtrbZIP44-A1 recruits PtrHDA15 to promoters of PtrCCoAOMT2 and PtrCCR2
PtF5H2 is direct target of PtNF-YA11; OE increases S-lignin, nf-ya11 KO decreases S-lignin
S/G lignin ratio increased in PtNF-YA11 OE poplar and decreased in nf-ya11 poplar
High S/G transgenic lines significantly more resistant to brown rot, white rot, and selective delignifying fungi
Splice variant of SND1 transcription factor acts as dominant negative of SND1 members
PtrVND6-C1 intron retention splice variant acts as negative regulator; reciprocal cross-regulation with SND1
PtrMYB161 binds and directly regulates two syringyl-specific monolignol genes (F5H/CAld5H)
PtrMYB74 activates promoters of all three main wood component-biosynthesis genes
PtrMYB128 activates promoters of all three main wood component-biosynthesis genes

perturbations.ev: Transgenic plants overexpressing PtoMYB156 show dramatic decrease in secondary wall thickness, lignin and xylose content compared with wild-type
35S:PdMYB221 in Arabidopsis: lignin decreased 28%, cellulose 10%, xylose 26%; plants cannot remain upright
PtKNAT7-OE: no significant changes in lignin content; 5-7% increase in S/G ratios
PtKNAT7-AS: ~6% decrease in lignin; 8-12% increase in S/G ratios
Expression of phosphorylation-null LTF1 mutant: stable protein accumulation and persistent attenuation of lignification
PtNF-YA11-overexpressing poplar: 17.8% increase in methane yield; increased S-lignin and S/G ratio
CRISPR-Cas9 edited nf-ya11 poplars: decrease in S-lignin composition and S/G ratio
CRISPR double KO of CSE1 and CSE2 shows importance and partial redundancy in lignification
Lignin content reduced 12-22% but S/G only slight increase (2.1 to 2.2, not significant)
